items.title: Students Academic Performance: Does Parents' Education Matter?
items.author: Hussein Shamas
items.description: Investigating whether parental education level influences students' academic performance in math, reading, and writing, and how this interacts with gender and test preparation course completion, using the Kaggle 'Students Performance in Exams' dataset (1000+ students).
